description: Baseline: 64 tests, all passing
Add devDependencies support, stale package pruning, mix npm.outdated task
Add bin linking (node_modules/.bin/) with string/map bin fields, scoped packages
Add mix npm.update, mix npm.run (scripts), read_scripts in PackageJSON
Add mix npm.info, mix npm.why, peerDependencies warnings, optionalDependencies parsing, pruning + bin integration tests
Add mix npm.cache, mix npm.exec, mix npm.init tasks; more round-trip and integration tests
Add mix npm.clean, directories.bin support, hoist/tarball/lockfile edge case tests
Add overrides, engines/bin registry parsing, mix npm.clean, peerDeps/engines integration tests
Add mix npm.ci, npm.check, npm.list --depth, fix .bin pruning bug, overrides support, expanded list output
Add custom registry URL, auth tokens, retry logic with backoff, 401/403 handling
Add mix npm.tree, npm.search, complex JSON/lockfile tests, scalability test
Add --save-exact flag, SHA-256 integrity, lockfile diff output, more spec parsing tests
Add deprecation warnings, SHA-256, deprecated/hasInstallScript/dist metadata, npm.version, npm.config, diamond dep test
Update README, CHANGELOG for v0.4.0, add deprecated package integration test, dist metadata test
Add mix npm.link, copy vs symlink tests, field preservation tests, resolver edge case tests
Add NPM.Compiler (Mix compiler), JSON roundtrip test, binary tarball test, resolver integration test
Add workspaces support (read_workspaces, expand_workspaces with glob patterns)
Add NPM.Validator (name/range validation), 10 validation tests
Add mix npm.diff, npm.pack, scoped package tests, fix copy strategy for scoped packages, validator edge cases
Add Tarball.fetch_and_extract integration tests with mock HTTP server, integrity mismatch test
Add mix npm.audit, dotfile preservation in prune, multi-cache test, special characters in lockfile test
Add optionalDependencies support, --save-optional flag, mix npm.dedupe, mix npm.audit
Add mix npm.prune, full flow test (install→prune→bins), optional deps field interaction test
Add file: dependency support, lockfile listing test, file_dep?/resolve_file_dep functions
Add mix npm.fund, comprehensive validator tests, empty lockfile test, error handling test — 200 tests milestone
Add cache path pattern tests, tarball multi-file extraction tests
Add mix npm.uninstall, npm.rebuild, update CHANGELOG with all 26 tasks and features
Add workspaces multi-pattern test, JSON indentation tests, comprehensive integrity tests
Add NPM.Config module (.npmrc file support), 6 parser tests
Add scoped validator tests, config priority tests, comprehensive PackageJSON read test
Add URL encoding test, hoist determinism test, lockfile write idempotency test
Add git_dep?/url_dep? detection, mix npm.ls alias, 10 new dep type tests
Add npmrc edge case tests, bin link overwrite test, validator name tests, cache ensure test — 250 tests milestone
Add NPM.Exports module (exports field parsing, conditional resolution, module type detection) with 14 tests
Add NPM.Platform module (os/cpu compat checks, engines warnings, current_os/cpu detection) with 17 tests
Add NPM.Lifecycle (install script detection), peerDependenciesMeta support, os/cpu registry fields
Add mix npm.doctor, resolutions support, scoped lifecycle test, prepare hook test
Add NPM.Alias (npm: prefix aliases), bundleDependencies support, mix npm.set task — 15 new tests
Add mix npm.publish (dry-run + registry upload), mix npm.token, make encode_package public — 5 new tests
Add NPM.VersionUtil (parse, compare, bump, sort, prerelease?), mix npm.shrinkwrap — 22 new tests
Add NPM.ScopeRegistry (per-scope registry URLs), mix npm.view (detailed package info) — 8 new tests
Add NPM.Integrity (SRI verification, parse, compute), mix npm.deprecations, mix npm.view — 16 new tests
Add Lockfile.version/package_names/has_package?/get_package, mix npm.explain — 6 new tests
Add NPM.DepTree (tree build, flatten, paths_to, depth, count), mix npm.licenses — 13 new tests
Add NPM.PackageSpec (structured specifier parser), mix npm.completion — 13 new tests
Add NPM.Manifest (structured package manifest), mix npm.completion — 400 tests milestone
Add NPM.DepGraph (adjacency list, fan-in/out, leaves, roots, cycles), mix npm.stats — 8 new tests
Add NPM.NodeModules (installed, version, diff, disk_size, file_count), mix npm.verify — 10 new tests
Add NPM.Packager (files_to_pack, pack_size), mix npm.size — 5 new tests
Add NPM.RegistryMirror (mirrors, URL rewriting), 5 cross-module integration tests — experiment 50
Fix * range resolution, add 23 real npm compatibility integration tests (registry, resolution, tarball integrity, bin fields, known express limitation)
Add 12 real npm semver compat tests (x-range, pre-release, caret-zero, tilde, hyphen, OR unions) — all verified against npm spec
Add real npm behavior tests: hoisting, pruning, lockfile round-trip fidelity, semver edge cases, cache path conventions — 500 tests
Add 6 real npm integration tests: multi-dep resolution, tarball content verification, lockfile round-trip reinstall
Two-phase resolver: detect version conflicts, exclude conflicting package, retry with nesting — express@4.x now resolves (69 packages + ms nested)
Track nested dependency parent info, fix credo nesting in save_original_deps
Add 13 npm semver compat tests ported from node-semver fixtures (caret, tilde, hyphen, x-range, union, exact)
Add 12 more npm semver compat tests: comparators, complex ranges, caret-zero semantics, tilde edge cases
Add tarball nested dir extraction test, integrity tamper test, copy strategy file type test
Add tarball strip_prefix test, verify_integrity edge cases (sha256, sha1, unknown algo, empty)
Add npm-compatible PackageJSON add/remove tests, symlink strategy verification — 6 real behavior tests
Add lockfile format tests (pretty-print, sorted keys, dependency ranges), registry parsing structure test

Add real-world exports pattern tests (Node.js import/require/default conditions, subpath exports)

Add real platform detection tests (OS/CPU compat with allowlist/blocklist)
Add real .npmrc config pattern tests, workspace read/expand tests — 8 real behavior tests
Add lifecycle script detection tests (esbuild, node-gyp, husky), npm naming rule validation tests — 10 tests
Add Alias parse/real_name tests, PackageSpec specifier parsing tests, DepTree traversal + depth tests — 11 real behavior tests

Implement nested linker (link_nested creates parent/node_modules/nested_pkg dirs), wire into full_install, add 2 nested structure tests
